form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last campaign sixth of 11 at Moe Mdn-Sw August 24 over 1200m, soft track; 12 len behind Torsheen carrying 57kg at $12. When resuming last campaign eighth of 14 at Bendigo 2yo Mdn-Sw July 13 over 1000m, on rain affected going; 10 len behind Cannyworth carrying 58kg at $41. Others make more appeal.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-9). First-up. Finished off last campaign sixth of 11 at Moe Mdn-Sw August 24 over 1200m, soft track; 12 len behind Torsheen carrying 57kg at $12. When resuming last campaign eighth of 14 at Bendigo 2yo Mdn-Sw July 13 over 1000m, on rain affected going; 10 len behind Cannyworth carrying 58kg at $41. Others make more appeal.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.
Had difficulty obtaining clear running from the 300m to the 150m.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Third-up today and placed third-up previously.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 57-day let-up. Most recently 3rd of 9 at Kilmore Mdn-Sw on February 13 over 1450m, 3 len behind Crespiano with 59kg at $2.20. The start before that set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 8 at Tatura Mdn-Sw on December 14 over 1450m, nose behind Open Bar carrying 58kg at $2.60. rates well for this contest.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7.5). Racing well recently. Returns from a 57-day let-up. The start before that set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 8 at Tatura Mdn-Sw on December 14 over 1450m, nose behind Open Bar carrying 58kg at $2.60. rates well for this contest.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, bumped by Etched In Blue.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Gelding by Jungle Cat making his first appearance. Ran 3rd in a trial at Rockhampton over 1000m on October 7. Pay to keep an eye on betting moves.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. Gelding by Jungle Cat making his first appearance. Ran 3rd in a trial at Rockhampton over 1000m on October 7. Pay to keep an eye on betting moves.

form.formComment: At debut, 5th of 12 at Eagle Farm 3yo Hcp on March 21 over 1000m, 2 len behind Angel Ladder with 54.5kg at $21. Promising type who will prove hard to beat.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-15.5). At debut, 5th of 12 at Eagle Farm 3yo Hcp on March 21 over 1000m, 2 len behind Angel Ladder with 54.5kg at $21. Promising type who will prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Resuming after a break; only one run when ran last in a small field at Gold Coast Mdn-Sw on November 8 over 1000m, 6 len behind Betta Than Presley with 55kg at $26. Go well if the Doomben trial is guide.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Dual acceptor. Resuming after a break; only one run when ran last in a small field at Gold Coast Mdn-Sw on November 8 over 1000m, 6 len behind Betta Than Presley with 55kg at $26. Go well if the Doomben trial is guide.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 300m rolled out and contacted Goldarnie.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly making debut by Better Than Ready out of Catherinette. Fourth at Rockhampton in a 1000m trial on March 25. Fitter for recent trials and keep onside.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Three-year-old filly making debut by Better Than Ready out of Catherinette. Fourth at Rockhampton in a 1000m trial on March 25. Fitter for recent trials and keep onside.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when ran last of 9 at Eagle Farm 2yo Mdn-Sw on July 2 over 1000m, on a slow track; 14 len behind Sweet Hesitation with 56kg at $20. Has to lift substantially to make an impression.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-6). Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when ran last of 9 at Eagle Farm 2yo Mdn-Sw on July 2 over 1000m, on a slow track; 14 len behind Sweet Hesitation with 56kg at $20. Has to lift substantially to make an impression.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over-raced in the middle stages. Inclined to lay in, in the home straight.
